CheckTitle: Check if E2E Networks database clusters with public IPs have IP whitelisting configured
Description: This check verifies that E2E Networks database clusters exposing a public IP restrict connectivity through an IP whitelist instead of accepting connections from any address.
Risk: Database clusters without IP whitelisting allow broader network access and increase unauthorized connection risk.

Recommendation.Text: Configure an IP whitelist on publicly exposed database clusters to allow only trusted source ranges.
